title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLIX. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Rosemary green,
            And lavender blue,
        Thyme and sweet marjoram,
            Hyssop and rue.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLIX. Love And Matrimony.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
